creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi everyone, just to provide a summary of my recent changes:

The lang/gcc[6789]-devel ports have received fixes for one of the two
issues (so only one of the two workarounds should still be necessary)
and I've updated the respective release branches upstream, so local
patches have been becoming obsolete as we update to those newer snapshots.

The lang/gcc[678] ports will receive those updates with their next releases.
